turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: OPEN A BANK ACCOUNT

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, would like to open a new bank account

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Is this account for personal use or for a business?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I would like to open a new saving account in the bank.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! Are you planning to open this account individually, or will it be a joint account with someone else?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Not individually, it's for me.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, just for you. Now, do you have any specific preferences for the type of savings account, like interest rates or features?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm not sure, it's just a student account.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, a student account works perfectly. Could you let me know if you have any specific documents or ID that you’ll be bringing along for the application?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “아, 그럼요. 제 파스포드와 아이디가 있습니다.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that’ll work well. Is there a particular branch or location where you'd like to open the account, or is any branch convenient for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm located in Redfern.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, Redfern works

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! So we’ll go ahead with the Redfern branch. Is there a specific time or day that works best for you to come in, or are you flexible?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm flexible, but I would like to know that should I do an appointment for that.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It’s definitely helpful to have an appointment, but walk-ins are usually welcome as well. Would you like me to help you schedule an appointment, or do you prefer to just drop by at your convenience?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe we can do the appointment right now. What about Monday? Tomorrow is going to be Monday, maybe Monday at 3 p.m.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds great! I’ll schedule you for Monday at 3 p.m. Is there any additional information or special requests you’d like to add?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, I think that's it, but can I open my account without the TVN number?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a great question! In most cases, you’ll need a TFN for certain types of accounts, but we can definitely check the requirements for a student account. We’ll go over it during your appointment as well. Sound good?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, sure. You need my telephone number, iPhone number, sorry, or my home address?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that would be helpful. If you could provide your phone number, that way we can confirm your appointment and reach out if needed. And if you’d like, we can also note your home address for any future correspondence. Whatever’s easiest for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Awesome, awesome. Yeah, my phone number is 0450-932-105.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, thank you! I've got that noted down. We’re all set for Monday at 3 p.m. If you have any other questions before then, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, my home address is 50 Wells Street.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Awesome, thank you for

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Kode postal adalah 2016.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I’ve got all the details now. We’re all set for your appointment on Monday. If anything else comes up, feel free to reach out. Looking forward to helping you get started!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I would like to know, you mentioned about the features, what's the difference between one or another bank account, for example, mine is student, but what's the difference with another kind of bank accounts?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! Generally, student accounts often have lower fees, sometimes higher interest rates on savings, and additional perks like no minimum balance requirements. Regular accounts might have more standard fees or different features. We can definitely go over all the details during your appointment to find the best fit for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I got it, I got it, thank you. Yeah, I have another question. Is there a monthly fee for this account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a great question! Usually, student accounts have minimal or even no monthly fees, but it can vary by bank and by specific account type. We’ll definitely confirm all those details when we meet, so you’ll have a clear picture!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you, thank you so much. You guys offer also credit cards because I'm pretty new in the city and I think any moment I'm gonna need a credit card here.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we do offer credit cards as well! We can go over the options during your appointment and find one that suits your needs, especially as you settle into the city. We’ll make sure everything’s covered!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I did the process already online, but unfortunately, I forgot.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries at all,

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “My online banking password. Can you help me with that, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! We can definitely help you reset your password during your visit, and make sure you have everything set up properly. Just bring along any identification and we’ll get it sorted out for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, just in case if someday I lost my card. What's the process to get a new one?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! If you ever lose your card, you can contact us right away, and we’ll freeze it to prevent any unauthorized charges. Then, we’ll arrange for a replacement card, usually sent to your address. We’ll go through all the steps and make it super easy for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, could you confirm my address, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Your address is 50 Wells Street, Redfern, with the postal code 2026. Let me know if that’s correct or if there’s anything else you’d like to update!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “That's absolutely absolutely right. Thank you. And how do I check if international platforms are enabled on my account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! You can usually check that through your online banking portal, where you can manage your settings. And if you prefer, we can also help you enable or confirm that during your appointment, so you’ll be all set for international transfers.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What's the feed for the international transfers?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That can vary depending on the destination and the amount, but we can definitely go over the specific fee structure during your appointment. We’ll make sure you have a clear understanding of everything before you get started!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, for example, my transfers that are going to be to Colombia.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! Transfers Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That makes sense! We can look into the specific rates and fees for transfers to Colombia and find the best option for you. We’ll make sure everything’s clear and convenient when we meet!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “質問に答えられますが、アバラッシュストリートを教えてください。”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Typically, the fee can range from a small flat fee to a percentage of the amount being transferred. On average, it might be around $10 to $20, but we can give you a precise number once we look at your specific bank and the amount. We’ll cover all that in detail when we meet!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, no, no, no, that's perfect. For now, that's, uh, that's okay.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that sounds

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, okay, I'll see you, I think, I'll see you tomorrow for the appointment and thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’m looking forward to it. If you have any other questions before then, just let me know. Have a great day, and see you tomorrow!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! Take care, and I'll see you soon. Have a wonderful day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “See you soon. Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, see you soon! Take care!
